title: Aurebesh Font
description: Change Minecraft's default text to Aurebesh
body:
# The Resource Pack

Want your Minecraft to look like it's from a galaxy far, far away?
Well this is the pack for you!

Make Minecraft use the Star Wars Alphabet, Aurebesh.

## Features

- Changes all the default text to Aurebesh (aka Galactic Basic)

# Technical

The, less so, but still important bits.

## Installation

Simply move the _.zip_ to your _"resourcepacks"_ folder in your minecraft directory.

## Links

My [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@JJplayz565) and my [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/jjplayz565).

Check out my [other resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hardcorehearts).

Check out my [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/murgers)
